allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in sorted\(d['paths']\) if 'my-' in p or 'event' in p]")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter 'ProcessId=30864' | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine, ExecutablePath")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*uvicorn*'\\'' -or $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*main:app*'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*8000*'\\'' -or $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*uvicorn*'\\'' -or $_.Name -like '\\''*python*'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine')
